calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Maria Lertora, #11935.

Petitioner David Hayeems was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors Saidah Iman Hayeems and Tsedalee Naiomi Hayeems, who were not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication was filed today, September 1, 2009.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to Nicole Saidah Hayeems and Naiomi Tsedalee Hayeems.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
